contractRemarks: Meeting point: Hotel pick-up // Meeting point instructions: Please ensure you arrive at the meeting point at least 15 minutes prior to the pick up time // Start/Opening time: 8:30am // End/Closing time: 6:30pm // End point: Same as the starting point // Duration: 10 hours // Inclusions: Private or small group Tour. Tickets to Dali Theatre - Museum. Bilingual Guide. Walking tour of Girona Old Town. Walking tour of Figueres. Hotel or apartment pickup and drop-off (in Barcelona city). Transport by private vehicle //Exclusions: Food or beverages // Mandatory instructions: Children must be accompanied by an adult. You will receive your specific pickup time confirmation 2 days prior to the tour date. Please ensure you have answered the mandatory questions during the booking process to ensure the correct provision of the service // Supplier name: In Out Barcelona Tours // Supplier emergency phone: +34 676 707 000 // Voucher type: Voucherless. You don’t need to bring any voucher (digital or printed)! // Voucher validity: Service date.
